privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task uses synthetically generated data to manage asset relocation in Snipe-IT. The source location 'London Office' and target location 'New York Office' exactly match the database queries in setup_task.sh. The expected relocation note substring 'RELOCATED' matches the checks in export_result.sh. The required new asset tags 'ASSET-D004' and 'ASSET-M004' match the export scripts and verifier.py logic. The scoring weights exactly align with the point allocations defined in verifier.py.
